description: The observed ratio drops from 3.11 (p=2) to 1.45 (p=1019), with least squares regression (R^2=0.91) showing ratio decreases as p increases; no values exceed 2·log(p) for p ≥ 23. Standard deviation for p ≥ 23 is 0.039. Temper claim: data is consistent with, but does not prove, the conjectured bound.
